title: Target Lock-On
description: A mod that adds a simple targeting system to Minecraft with tons of configurations. Even custom indicators!
body:
## 🎯 TargetLock - Advanced Lock-On Targeting System

**Highly Recommended: [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured)**
 

**The most comprehensive lock-on targeting system for Minecraft 1.20.1!**

### 🎮 Core Features:
- Smart Targeting: 4 targeting modes with AI prioritization and predictive tracking
- Smooth Camera: Fluid movement with third-person perspective optimization
- Custom Indicators: Drop your PNG images into the config folder for personalized targeting reticles
- Professional HUD: Clean target information with health bars and distance display
- 60+ Configuration Options: Complete customization for every playstyle
### 🔧 Third-Person Enhanced:
- Automatic detection and optimization for popular camera mods
- Enhanced targeting range and angles in third-person view
- Smooth camera integration that works seamlessly with modded perspectives
- Input conflict resolution for perfect compatibility
### ⌨️ Default Controls:
- R - Lock-On Target | T - Cycle Target | ESC - Clear Target
- Ctrl + 1/2/3 - Quick Targeting Modes | Ctrl + I/V - Visual Controls
- All keybindings are fully customizable
### 📁 Custom Indicators:
- Drop PNG files in .minecraft/config/lockonmod/custom_indicators/
- Use 64x64 pixels for best results
- Press F3+T to reload, then Ctrl + V to cycle

**Perfect for PvP, boss fights, exploration, and enhanced accessibility!**
